title: Filipino-Style Grilled Beef Bistek
description: A classic Filipino dish, this grilled beef bistek is marinated in a mixture of soy sauce, vinegar, and black pepper, then grilled to perfection. This dish is best served with steamed rice.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine soy sauce, vinegar, and black pepper. Mix well.
Add the sliced beef to the marinade and mix until the beef is well coated.
Let the beef marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Remove the beef from the marinade and grill for 3-4 minutes per side, or until the beef is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the beef to a cutting board and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Slice the beef against the grain into thin strips.
Serve the beef with a side of steamed rice and sautéed onions and garlic.
Optional: Serve with a side of grilled vegetables, such as bell peppers and onions.
Optional: Serve with a side of steamed broccoli or other steamed vegetables.
